meta.title: İzmir Balıkçısı — Alcohol-Free Fresh Seafood · Fethiye / Muğla
meta.description: An alcohol-free, family-friendly fresh seafood restaurant in Fethiye / Muğla. A table of thirty-five years since 1989.
meta.menuDescription: The full İzmir Balıkçısı menu: mezes, soups, grilled fish, steamed and fried dishes, and alcohol-free drinks. A table of thirty-five years in Fethiye / Muğla.
meta.notFoundDescription: The page you're looking for wasn't found. You can return home or to the menu.

hero.sideLabel: Thirty-Five Years at the Table · Vol. XXXV
hero.lede: A thirty-five-year, alcohol-free home in Muğla. Children laughing, elders at ease, and whatever the kitchen is cooking today. Not an editorial; a plate.

about.intro: A father and a son. The market at four in the morning, the lights at seven in the evening. Everything in between: fish.

1989.title: The first stall
1989.body: Hasan started before dawn with a single ice stall. No menu, no sign — just that day's sea, a scale, and two hands that knew how to wait.
1989.caption: Archive · Tuzla, 1989

1995.title: The lights came on
1995.body: The stall became a dining room. Ayşe became the quiet keeper of the tables; the first light at seven still called those waiting behind the same door.
1995.caption: Archive · First room, 1995

2008.title: The son in the kitchen
2008.body: Yusuf joined his father. The old recipes stayed, the hands multiplied — sea bream rested under salt for the first time, and the table grew without ever hurrying.
2008.caption: Archive · Bream in salt, 2008

2026.title: The same sea
2026.body: Thirty-five years, zero alcohol, one hundred and twenty-four seats. The father still walks the market first, the son still cracks the salt. The sea is in no hurry; neither are we.
2026.caption: Today · Mustafa Kemal Blv.

lines.1: Because what brightens a table isn't the glasses; it's the shared laughter, the stories told, and a fresh fish served hot off the grill.
lines.2: Dinner isn't about getting tipsy; it's about gathering at the same table with the ones you love.
lines.3: The finest moments hide in the smile of a child swinging their feet on a chair, in the patience of a grandchild cleaning fish with their grandfather.
lines.4: For thirty-five years we've set the same table. Warm, sincere and open to all.
lines.5: Come in — we'll be waiting at our table.

reviews.title: The same table, thousands of evenings.
reviews.expSub: The same door, the same table since 1989

items.name: Mehmet A.
items.text: The sea bass was cooked just right, the mezes ultra-fresh. We sat comfortably with the kids; being alcohol-free is a big plus for us. Our first choice for years.

items.name: Selin K.
items.text: We've come as a family for thirty years and the taste has never changed. The waiters greet us by name. This isn't a restaurant, it's a second home.

items.name: David R.
items.text: Best fresh fish in Fethiye. Honest prices, no alcohol but a warm, family atmosphere. The sea bass was perfect.

items.name: Hakan Y.
items.text: Here you understand what fish straight from the market means. Fast service, generous portions. Go early for a window seat.

contact.title:
Let's book

a table.
contact.lede: The phone is fastest. Call a little early for a window seat; the best light is between 19.30 and 20.15.

footer.sisterText: The same plates of thirty-five years; the sound of gulls, the late-afternoon breeze and tables facing straight out to sea. Following İzmir Balıkçısı, on Fethiye's Çalış beach.
footer.sisterAria: Visit Çalış Balıkçısı — opens in a new tab
footer.brandCopy: In Fethiye since 1989. The same door, the same table, the same plates for thirty-five years. An editorial restaurant.

sister.modalTitle:
The same table's

sibling on the

Çalış coast.
sister.modalLede: The same plates of thirty-five years, a different shore: the sound of gulls, the late-afternoon breeze and a table facing straight out to sea. Following İzmir Balıkçısı, on Fethiye's Çalış beach.

seasonal.label: Season

menuFull.title: Menu
menuFull.lede: A table of thirty-five years. Plates that change with the season; from whole grilled fish to salt-baked at the table, from crisp fried plates to mastic pudding. This is an alcohol-free home — like coming home.
menuFull.note: This is an alcohol-free home. Instead of wine and rakı there's homemade lemonade, frothed ayran, cold Turkish coffee and endless tea in slim-waisted glasses. Let us know at the table for children's portions.
menuFull.sheetDaily: Fresh daily — sold by the kilo, please ask for today's price.
menuFull.sheetFoot: ESC / Swipe down / Tap outside — to close

notFound.title: No seat at this table.
notFound.lede: The page you're looking for was either removed or never existed. Let's head back to the main table — or take a look at the menu.
